arts.ttl: Chelsea target Arsenal FLOP as January deal edges closer
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eager to sign Lazio defender Nuno Tavares amid reports that Renato Veiga could leave the club this month. However, the Portugal international has notched eight assists in just 16 Serie A games so far this season, and although Lazio have no intention of selling Tavares during the January window, Chelsea have reportedly enquired over a possible transfer this summer.

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Manu Silva deal off as Portuguese giants win race for midfielder?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are reportedly handed a significant January transfer blow having lost out on a deal for Vitoria de Guimaraes midfielder Manu Silva.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer: Saint Kitts and proud
arts.sum: Chelsea and England forward Cole Palmer proudly owns his Saint Kitts and Nevis roots. DJ on the island of Saint Kitts, Leslie 'Sugar Bowl' Morton IV, tells BBC Sport what he means to the country.

arts.ttl: Juventus Eyes Chelsea Duo: Veiga and Chilwell in Transfer Crosshairs
arts.sum: Juventus are set to engage in discussions with Chelsea regarding a potential transfer of Renato Veiga. The 21-year-old versatile defender has recently been the subject of transfer speculation, with rumours of his departure from Stamford Bridge gaining traction in recent weeks. The post Juventus Eyes Chelsea Duo: Veiga and Chilwell in Transfer Crosshairs appeared first on FootItalia.com.
